# A Aesthetics — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A aesthetic beauty and wellness spa located in Gan Yavne, Israel, offering a curated range of luxury treatments including head spa, massages, facial treatments, laser hair removal, and lash and brow lifts. The brand carries a calm, aesthetic, and inviting vibe — inspired by their Instagram presence (@a_aesthetic_il) — with a focus on elegance, serenity, and a refined beauty experience that feels both professional and deeply relaxing.

---

## Pages

### דף הבית
https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app
חוויית ספא אסתטי ומפנק בגן יבנה עם טיפולי ראש, מסאז&#39;ים, הסרת שיער בלייזר והרמת ריסים. בואי ליהנות מרגע של שלווה ויופי אמיתי — קבעי תור עוד היום.

### תודה רבה - steam beauty and wellness spa
https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app/thank-you
תודה רבה על פנייתך למרכז steam beauty and wellness spa. הודעתך התקבלה בהצלחה ונחזור אליך בהקדם.

## How to Contact Us

- Phone: 0544232788
- Phone (tel): tel:0544232788
- Address: הפלך 1, גן יבנה, Israel, Israel

### Contact form
- URL: https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About A Aesthetics
A aesthetic beauty and wellness spa located in Gan Yavne, Israel, offering a curated range of luxury treatments including head spa, massages, facial treatments, laser hair removal, and lash and brow lifts. The brand carries a calm, aesthetic, and inviting vibe — inspired by their Instagram presence (@a_aesthetic_il) — with a focus on elegance, serenity, and a refined beauty experience that feels both professional and deeply relaxing.

## Target Audience
- אנשי מקצוע עסוקים
- הכנות לכלות
- חובבי בריאות ורווחה

## Industry
Beauty & Wellness Spa

- Robots: https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://a-aesthetics.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
